title: Format Java Request v0
description: Studio-IDE-14 (#256): request body for `POST /api/v0/format/java` on the c2c BFF and for the upstream `POST /v0/format-java` on build-test-runner-service. Governed by ADR 0006 (Studio-BFF Contract Versioning). The BFF caps `content` size via C2C_FORMAT_JAVA_SOURCE_MAX_BYTES (default 1 MiB).

schemaVersion.description: DTO version per ADR 0006. Optional on the wire; absence means "v0".

content.description: Java source to format. Idempotent on already-formatted content per the Studio-IDE-14 acceptance criteria.

filePath.description: Optional path included in upstream error messages. Has no effect on the formatted output.
